function.name: BoneReconstructionPlanner
function.description: Guided interactive workflow for BoneReconstructionPlanner. Execute steps in order. Interactive steps require user 3D interaction. Steps: 'cb_step_1': If the fibula is from the right leg, tick the "Right side leg" checkbox.; 'cb_step_2': In the "Select mandibular segmentation" section, choose the mandibular segmentation.; 'cb_step_3': In the "Select fibula segmentation" section, choose the fibula segmentation.; 'cb_step_4': For the "Current Scalar Volume" option, select the Mandible Volume.; 'cb_step_5': Click "Create bone models from segmentations" button.; 'cb_step_6': Change the layout to "Conventional".; 'cb_step_7': For the R (red) view, toggle on "slice visibility in 3D view".; 'cb_step_8': For the R (red) view, toggle on "FOV, Spacing match 2D" (adjusts slice resolution to match the 2D viewport pixel spacing).; 'cb_step_9': In the toolbar, turn on "slice intersection visibility". In the slice intersection interaction options, turn on "set interaction", then enable both "Translate" and "Rotate".; 'cb_step_10': Manually adjust the slice intersection position by translate and rotate of the cross lines in each view. (interactive: generic)

user_action.description: Action: 'start' to begin a step, 'proceed' after user completes interaction, 'skip' for optional steps, 'cancel' to abort workflow, 'choice_made' for user_choice steps

choice_value.description: Value selected by the user for user_choice steps. Required when user_action is 'choice_made'.
